SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.spi

Class WeakInterner

java.lang.Object
st.orm.core.spi.WeakInterner
public final class WeakInterner extends Object
A weak interner that ensures canonical instances of objects while holding them weakly to permit garbage collection.

This class uses a dual-path interning strategy optimized for different object types:

  • Entities: Uses primary key-based lookup via Ref for efficient equality checks. Entities are stored in a separate map with ReferenceQueue-based cleanup to ensure stale entries are removed when entities are garbage collected.
  • Non-entities: Uses object equality-based lookup via WeakHashMap, which provides automatic cleanup when objects are no longer strongly referenced.

The primary key-based lookup for entities avoids potentially expensive deep equality checks on complex entity objects, while maintaining correct identity semantics (same primary key = same canonical instance).

This class is not thread-safe. A new instance is expected to be created for each result set processing call, ensuring that interning is scoped to a single query execution.

  • Constructor Details

    • WeakInterner

      public WeakInterner()
      Creates a new weak interner.

  • Method Details

    • intern

      public <T> T intern(@Nonnull T object)
      Interns the given object, ensuring that only one canonical instance exists. If an equivalent object is already present, returns the existing instance. Otherwise, adds the new object to the interner and returns it.

      For Entity instances, lookup is performed using the entity's primary key (via Ref) for efficiency. For all other objects, lookup is based on object equality.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the object.
      Parameters:
      object - the object to intern.
      Returns:
      the canonical instance of the object.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if object is null.

    • get

      public <E extends Entity<?>> E get(@Nonnull Class<E> entityType, @Nonnull Object pk)
      Retrieves a cached entity by its type and primary key, if available.

      This method enables early cache lookups before constructing nested objects. If an entity with the given type and primary key was previously interned and is still reachable, it is returned.

      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class.
      pk - the primary key value.
      Returns:
      the cached entity, or null if not found or already garbage collected.
